subcodes.first_line: O bewildered and enraptured lover of the Ancient Beauty! The sacrificial ode hath been studied with care. In truth, it is eloquent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته و سودائی جمال قدم غزل قربانی بدقت مطالعه گردید فی الحقیقه فصیح است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
